description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: build and test. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, installs dependencies, updates submodules, and then runs make, make tutorial, and make install. The test job, named fedora, also runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Podman, pulls a fedora:rawhide image, checks out the code in a subdirectory, creates a Podman file, and uses it to build an image and run tests.
